title: Weyerhaeuser (WY) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: Discounted cash flow analysis estimating the intrinsic value of Weyerhaeuser's timberlands and wood products business.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 2.5%: Reflects modest long-term volume growth tied to a structural housing deficit, offset by near-term macroeconomic softness.
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: 2.0%: Represents long-term inflation and the enduring, slow-growing nature of North American timberland assets.
assumptions.discountRate: 8.0%: An 8.0% discount rate reflects the asset-heavy, stable nature of timberlands, blended with the cyclical risk of the lumber segment.
